title: Senior Android Developer for Sport Team

summary.lv: GR8 Tech (sporta likmju tehnoloģiju uzņēmums) attālināti meklē Senior Android izstrādātāju, kas pievienosies Sport komandai un veidos pamatproduktus tiešsaistes sporta likmju nozarē.
summary.en: GR8 Tech, a sports-betting technology company, is hiring a Senior Android Developer remotely to join the Sport team and build core mobile products for the online sports-betting industry.
